workflow_rationale: This introduces new functionality (user preferences, conversion UI components) rather than modifying existing behavior. Requires database schema changes, new UI components, and integration across multiple parts of the application.

phases.name: Database & Type Foundations
phases.description: Add database migration for preferred_weight_unit column and verify existing type definitions

subtasks.description: Create Supabase migration for preferred_weight_unit column
subtasks.notes: Created migration file 20260101162806_add_preferred_weight_unit.sql following existing patterns. Added column to profiles table with TEXT type, default 'g', and CHECK constraint for valid units (g, oz, lb). Used IF NOT EXISTS pattern for idempotency. Verification passed - all required elements present.

subtasks.description: Verify WeightUnit type and constants in types/gear.ts
subtasks.notes: Verified WeightUnit type ('g' | 'oz' | 'lb') and WEIGHT_UNIT_LABELS constant are already defined in types/gear.ts

phases.name: User Preferences Hook
phases.description: Create or extend useUserPreferences hook to manage weight unit preference with Supabase persistence

subtasks.description: Create or extend useUserPreferences hook with weight unit getter/setter

verification.expected: Hook exports preferredWeightUnit state and setter function

subtasks.notes: Follow Zustand pattern from useLoadouts.ts. Include Supabase update on setter. Default to 'g' if not set.

subtasks.description: Write unit tests for useUserPreferences weight unit logic
subtasks.notes: Mock Supabase client. Test default value, setter, and persistence.

phases.name: Weight Conversion Hook
phases.description: Create useWeightConversion hook that wraps lib/utils/weight.ts and integrates with user preferences

subtasks.description: Create useWeightConversion hook with convert and formatWeight functions

verification.expected: Hook exports conversion utilities that respect user preference

subtasks.notes: Use useMemo to cache conversions. Integrate with useUserPreferences for default unit.

subtasks.description: Write unit tests for useWeightConversion hook

verification.expected: All conversion tests pass with memoization checks

subtasks.notes: Test conversion accuracy, formatting, and locale-specific number formatting

phases.name: Weight UI Components
phases.description: Create reusable WeightInput and WeightDisplay components

subtasks.description: Create WeightInput component with unit selector

checks: Weight input renders with unit dropdown

subtasks.notes: Stateless component. Accept value, unit, onChange props. Use react-hook-form compatible. Include shadcn Select for unit dropdown.

subtasks.description: Create WeightDisplay component with inline toggle and hover tooltip
subtasks.notes: Stateless component. Props: value (grams), showToggle, className. Use shadcn Tooltip for secondary unit display.

subtasks.description: Write component tests for WeightInput and WeightDisplay

verification.expected: Component tests pass for input and display

subtasks.notes: Test rendering, user interactions (dropdown, toggle, hover), and prop handling

phases.name: Profile Settings Integration
phases.description: Add weight unit preference selector to user profile settings page

subtasks.description: Add weight unit preference card to settings page
subtasks.notes: Add new Card component with Select dropdown. Use WEIGHT_UNIT_LABELS for options. Call setPreferredWeightUnit on change.

subtasks.description: Add i18n translations for weight unit preference UI
subtasks.notes: Add keys: settings.weight_unit.title, settings.weight_unit.description, settings.weight_unit.g, settings.weight_unit.oz, settings.weight_unit.lb

phases.name: Replace Weight Displays Across App
phases.description: Replace hardcoded weight displays in loadouts and gear items with WeightDisplay component

subtasks.description: Integrate WeightDisplay in loadout total displays

checks: Loadout totals show in preferred unit

subtasks.notes: Find all hardcoded weight displays in loadout components. Replace with <WeightDisplay value={weightGrams} showToggle />. Use useWeightConversion for totals calculation.

subtasks.description: Integrate WeightInput in gear item forms
subtasks.notes: Replace weight input fields in gear item create/edit forms. Integrate with react-hook-form. Ensure value saved to DB is always in grams.

phases.name: Integration Testing
phases.description: End-to-end verification of preference persistence and conversion across the application

subtasks.description: E2E test: Change preference and verify all displays update

steps: Navigate to /settings, change weight unit to 'oz'
Navigate to /loadouts, verify totals show in oz
Navigate to /inventory, add item with weight in 'lb', verify saves as grams

subtasks.notes: Use Vitest for integration test. Mock Supabase responses. Verify state updates propagate.

verification.instructions: Follow QA Acceptance Criteria from spec.md: verify conversion accuracy, accessibility (keyboard nav), performance (no lag on conversion), and browser compatibility (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)

subtasks.notes: See spec.md QA section for detailed checklist including accessibility and performance verification

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution required - phases have strict dependencies
parallelism.reasoning: Each phase builds on the previous. Database migration must complete before preferences hook, which must complete before UI components, etc.

acceptance_criteria: New unit tests for conversion logic pass
Integration tests for preference persistence pass
No console errors in browser or server

verification_steps.name: Unit Tests - Weight Conversion
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All conversion tests pass (g↔oz↔lb, precision, edge cases)

verification_steps.name: Unit Tests - Components
verification_steps.expected_outcome: WeightInput and WeightDisplay component tests pass

verification_steps.name: Browser Verification - Settings
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Weight unit dropdown in /settings saves and persists

verification_steps.name: Browser Verification - Loadouts
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Loadout totals display in preferred unit with working toggle

verification_steps.name: Database Migration
verification_steps.command: psql -h localhost -U postgres -d gearshack -c "SELECT preferred_weight_unit FROM profiles LIMIT 1;"

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk due to cross-cutting changes and database migration. Requires unit tests for conversion accuracy and integration tests for preference persistence. No security-sensitive areas involved.

checks: preferred_weight_unit column exists in profiles table
Weights stored in gear_items are in grams
